recommendations.title: Breaking Surface
recommendations.overview: Two Swedish/Norwegian half sisters go on a winter diving trip in Northern Norway, when they get trapped after a rockslide.

recommendations.title: Malibu Shark Attack
recommendations.overview: An underwater earthquake generates a tsunami that strikes Malibu, bringing a hunting pack of prehistoric-looking goblin sharks to the surface. Although the beach is evacuated before the big wave strikes, a group of lifeguards and a crew of constructi

recommendations.title: Cage Dive
recommendations.overview: Three friends from California are filming an audition tape for an extreme reality game show. They document their journey to Australia where they will be doing their most dangerous activity: Shark Cage Diving. A catastrophic turn of events leaves them

recommendations.title: The Telephone Box
recommendations.overview: A man gets trapped inside a telephone box and nobody is able to free him.

recommendations.title: Metal: A Headbanger's Journey
recommendations.overview: The film discusses the traits and originators of some of metal's many subgenres, including the New Wave of British Heavy Metal, power metal, Nu metal, glam metal, thrash metal, black metal, and death metal. Dunn uses a family-tree-type flowchart to d
recommendations.director: Jessica Joy Wise, Scot McFadyen, Sam Dunn

recommendations.title: The Ritual
recommendations.overview: A group of college friends reunite for a trip to the forest, but encounter a menacing presence in the woods that's stalking them.

recommendations.title: The Cave
recommendations.overview: After a group of biologists discovers a huge network of unexplored caves in Romania and, believing it to be an undisturbed eco-system that has produced a new species, they hire the best American team of underwater cave explorers in the world. While e

recommendations.title: Blackout
recommendations.overview: Three people from different walks of life find themselves trapped inside a stalled elevator. What at first seems like an inconvenience rapidly escalates into a nightmare.

recommendations.title: About Alex
recommendations.overview: When a group of old college friends reunite over a long weekend after one of them attempts suicide, old crushes and resentments shine light on their life decisions, and ultimately push friendships and relationships to the brink.
